name: Henry Jackman
description:
'''Henry Pryce Jackman''' (born 1 June 1974) is a British film and television score composer, conductor and arranger. He composed music for films such as ''[[Monsters vs. Aliens]]'', ''[[Kick-Ass (film)|Kick-Ass]]'' and [[Kick-Ass 2 (film)|its sequel]], ''[[X-Men: First Class]]'', ''[[Puss in Boots (2011 film)|Puss in Boots]]'', ''[[Captain Phillips (film)|Captain Phillips]]'', ''[[Turbo (2013 film)|Turbo]]'', ''[[Captain America: The Winter Soldier]]'', ''[[The Interview]],'' ''[[Pixels (2015 film)|Pixels]]'', ''[[Captain America: Civil War]]'', ''[[Kong: Skull Island]]'', ''[[Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle]]'' and [[Jumanji: The Next Level|its sequel]], ''[[Detective Pikachu (film)|Pokémon: Detective Pikachu]]'', ''[[Ron's Gone Wrong]]'', ''[[Red One (film)|Red One]]'', ''[[Smurfs (film)|Smurfs]]'' and five [[Walt Disney Animation Studios]] films, including ''[[Wreck-It Ralph (franchise)|Wreck-It Ralph]]'' and ''[[Big Hero 6 (film)|Big Hero 6]]''. Outside of film, he has also scored television series including ''[[The Man in the High Castle (TV series)|The Man in the High Castle]]'', ''[[The Comey Rule]]'' and ''[[The Falcon and the Winter Soldier]]'', and video games including ''[[Battlefield 6]]'', ''[[Disney Infinity (video game)|Disney Infinity]]'', ''[[Uncharted 4: A Thief's End]]'', ''[[Uncharted: The Lost Legacy]]'' and ''[[Just Cause 3]]''. 

He is also known for collaborating with directors including the [[Russo brothers]], [[Matthew Vaughn]], [[Rich Moore]], [[Don Hall (filmmaker)|Don Hall]], [[Chris Miller (animator)|Chris Miller]], [[Rob Letterman]], [[Seth Rogen]], [[Evan Goldberg]], [[Edward Zwick]], [[Jake Kasdan]] and [[Sam Hargrave]]; conductor [[Nick Glennie-Smith]]; scoring mixer [[Alan Meyerson]]; and violinist Eun-Mee Ahn.
